g.text: coef, A, b, inegalitate, OPT ← prob
ASSERT dim(A) compatibil cu dim(b), dim(coef), dim(inegalitate)
FOR i WHERE b[i] < 0: b[i] ← -b[i]; A[i] ← -A[i]; inverseaza semn[i]
IF semn[i] == (≤): adauga variabila slack y_i (coef = 0)
IF semn[i] == (≥): adauga surplus y_i (coef = 0) + artificial z_i (coef = OPT·M)
IF semn[i] == (=): adauga artificial z_i (coef = OPT·M)
Identifica coloanele-unitate din A → seteaza iBaza[ ], C_b[ ]
IF temp ≠ NULL AND Z evolueaza gresit → RETURN "z nu evolueaza corect"
IF optim → EXIT WHILE (merge la Faza 3)
IF MAX: intra ← argmax(Delta) IF MIN: intra ← argmin(Delta)
ratii[i] ← X_b[i] / col_pivot[i] daca col_pivot[i] > 0, altfel ∞
Normalizeaza randul pivot: A[iese] ← A[iese] / Pivot ; X_b[iese] ← X_b[iese] / Pivot
FOR i ≠ iese: A[i] ← A[i] − A[i,intra] · A[iese]
iBaza[iese] ← intra ; C_b[iese] ← coef[intra] → urmatoarea iteratie
FOR row_idx, var_idx IN enumerate(iBaza): solutie[var_idx] ← X_b[row_idx]
IF coef[var_idx] == ±M AND X_b[row_idx] > ε → RETURN "sistem incompatibil"
(variabila artificiala a ramas in baza cu valoare nenula)
Construieste solutie_detaliata: {x1, x2, ..., y_i, z_i} cu valoare, tip, coef
IF Baza_I_stop este goala → RETURN [False, False, False]
result[0] ← all(x ≥ 0 for x in solutie)
S ← A_initial[ : , iBaza ] (coloanele bazei finale din matricea initiala)
result[2] ← allclose( b_initial, S · X_b_final, atol=1e-3 )
